titleEn: AgriFood Signals: Bayer wins roundup case, CEO change at Vow, Reservoir acquires Contain
titleZh: AgriFood Signals：拜耳赢得草甘膦案、Vow CEO变更、Reservoir收购Contain
summaryZh: 本文是AgFunderNews的行业周报，汇总了2026年6月26日前后农业食品科技领域的重要融资、并购、人事变动及政策新闻。核心内容包括：拜耳在草甘膦诉讼中获美国最高法院支持、人造肉公司Vow因重组更换CEO、Reservoir收购Contain以加速农业机器人技术、多家初创公司获得融资（如Omni、Myota、Terraxy等），以及美国再生农业行政令、Keel Labs破产等。内容覆盖面广，但直接涉及智慧畜牧（IoT/AI/自动化/机器人）的条目较少。
featuredReason: 本文提供了农业食品科技领域的全景式动态，虽然直接涉及智慧畜牧的内容不多，但其中Reservoir收购Contain（加速农业机器人物理AI）以及多项与养殖、土壤、植物技术相关的融资并购，可为智慧畜牧从业者提供跨界技术趋势和资本流向的参考。
contentFull: AgriFood Signals: Bayer wins roundup case, CEO change at Vow, Reservoir acquires Contain June 26, 2026 | Jennifer Marston Agtech FoodTech Saudi Arabia-based Terraxy team. Image credit: Terraxy AgFunderNews rounds up the most important fundings, mergers, acquisitions, closures, and industry buzz in agtech and foodtech. Funding news 🇬🇧 Omni raises £11m Series A to fund US entry and an “Ozempic-style” dog supplement The Checkout 🇬🇧 Myota raises $4.5m to supply clinically backed fibre blends to F&B industry The Grocer 🇸🇦 Terraxy raises $3 million to scale desert greening and soil regeneration technology in Saudi Arabia iGrow News 🇦🇺 Coast 4C secures oversubscribed US$2.5 million seed round to scale smallholder seaweed farming in Southeast Asia Aquaculture Asia Pacific 🇬🇧 Fieldwork Robotics secures investment from Seed Innovations Fruitnet 🇫🇷 Kubota announces additional investment in French startup UV boosting, advanced plant resistance technology Kubota Image credit: Tropic M&A, IPOs & partnerships 🇬🇧 🇮🇱 Tropic acquires leading global plant propagation business Rahan Meristem Fresh Fruit Portal 🇫🇷 🇦🇺 Danone buys Australian dairy producer Made in Protein Push Bloomberg 🇺🇸 Zume Pizza technology is acquired by Flippy owner Miso Nation’s Restaurant News 🇺🇸 Reservoir acquires Contain to accelerate rugged physical AI agtech startups Dealroom 🇳🇱 Schouten buys fellow Dutch plant-based meat player to expand Europe footprint Green Queen Funds, grants & accelerators 🇬🇧 UK: New £53 million investment for growing innovation Horti Daily 🇧🇪 Zymofix receives €1.9M grant FinSMEs 🇱🇺 🇯🇵 European and Japanese impact firms team up to launch $75m blue economy fund Impact Loop People moves 🇦🇺 CEO shakeup at Vow amid restructure at lab-grown meat startup Forbes 🇬🇧 Former brand chief returns to lead The Vegetarian Butcher Collective Vegconomist Image credit: Liberation Bioindustries Other news 🇺🇸 Supreme Court ruling blocks thousands of lawsuits against the maker of Roundup weedkiller AP News 🇬🇧 British EUDR? UK government to introduce anti-deforestation rules Food Navigator 🇫🇷 Micropep Technologies files for regulatory approval of Promisin biofungicide in Brazil and Paraguay iGrow News 🇦🇺 Goterra administrator seeks buyer as founder warns of insect ag sector ‘contagion’ AgFunderNews 🇺🇸 President Trump signs executive order advancing regenerative agriculture; Secretary Rollins announces USDA rule to unlock billions for American farmers USDA 🇺🇸 Seaweed yarn maker Keel Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy Yahoo Finance 🇺🇸 Liberation Bioindustries pauses construction again as it seeks funds to complete US biomanufacturing site AgFunderNews Share this article Sign up for our weekly newsletter. Deep innovation, limited capital define Argentina’s agrifoodtech opportunity Agtech Developing markets Spring Innovation Fund debuts as first venture philanthropy firm dedicated to animal welfare tech Agtech Deeptech Deep innovation, limited capital define Argentina’s agrifoodtech opportunity Agtech Developing markets Spring Innovation Fund debuts as first venture philanthropy firm dedicated to animal welfare tech Agtech Deeptech
translationZh:
AgriFood Signals：拜耳赢得草甘膦案、Vow CEO变更、Reservoir收购Contain
2026年6月26日 | Jennifer Marston
Agtech FoodTech
总部位于沙特阿拉伯的Terraxy团队。图片来源：Terraxy
AgFunderNews汇总了农业科技和食品科技领域最重要的融资、并购、关闭及行业动态。

融资新闻
🇬🇧 Omni融资1100万英镑A轮，用于进入美国市场及推出“Ozempic式”狗用补充剂 The Checkout
🇬🇧 Myota融资450万美元，为食品饮料行业提供临床支持的纤维混合物 The Grocer
🇸🇦 Terraxy融资300万美元，在沙特阿拉伯推广沙漠绿化与土壤再生技术 iGrow News
🇦🇺 Coast 4C获得超额认购的250万美元种子轮融资，用于扩大东南亚小农海藻养殖 Aquaculture Asia Pacific
🇬🇧 Fieldwork Robotics获得Seed Innovations投资 Fruitnet
🇫🇷 Kubota宣布对法国初创公司UV boosting追加投资，涉及先进植物抗性技术 Kubota
图片来源：Tropic

并购、IPO及合作
🇬🇧 🇮🇱 Tropic收购全球领先植物繁殖企业Rahan Meristem Fresh Fruit Portal
🇫🇷 🇦🇺 Danone收购澳大利亚乳制品生产商Made in Protein Push Bloomberg
🇺🇸 Zume Pizza技术被Flippy所有者Miso收购 Nation's Restaurant News
🇺🇸 Reservoir收购Contain，以加速农业机器人初创公司的物理AI技术 Dealroom
🇳🇱 Schouten收购荷兰植物基肉类同行，扩大欧洲足迹 Green Queen

基金、资助及加速器
🇬🇧 英国：新设5300万英镑投资用于促进创新 Horti Daily
🇧🇪 Zymofix获得190万欧元资助 FinSMEs
🇱🇺 🇯🇵 欧洲和日本影响力公司联手设立7500万美元蓝色经济基金 Impact Loop

人事变动
🇦🇺 人造肉初创公司Vow因重组更换CEO Forbes
🇬🇧 前品牌负责人回归领导The Vegetarian Butcher Collective Vegconomist
图片来源：Liberation Bioindustries

其他新闻
🇺🇸 美国最高法院裁决阻止数千起针对草甘膦除草剂制造商的诉讼 AP News
🇬🇧 英国EUDR？英国政府将引入反毁林法规 Food Navigator
🇫🇷 Micropep Technologies在巴西和巴拉圭申请Promisin生物杀菌剂监管批准 iGrow News
🇦🇺 Goterra管理人寻求买家，创始人警告昆虫农业领域“传染效应” AgFunderNews
🇺🇸 特朗普总统签署推进再生农业的行政令；农业部长Rollins宣布USDA规则，为美国农民释放数十亿美元 USDA
🇺🇸 海藻纱线制造商Keel Labs申请第11章破产 Yahoo Finance
🇺🇸 Liberation Bioindustries再次暂停建设，寻求资金完成美国生物制造基地 AgFunderNews

author: Jennifer Marston
